mentions.note: Up 65% Q1 but down 14% this week; owns Permian Basin land, leases to drillers, sells water for fracking; vulnerable to oil price declines if war ends.

February's best S&P performer (+50.5%) on crude oil tailwind; owns Texas land leased to energy producers and sells water for hydraulic fracturing. Data center land play emerging as secondary growth vector.
Bolt data center business promising but company still trades primarily on oil/gas fundamentals; Cramer suggests spec play only if bullish on higher oil prices.
